Paragraph
.
Hello world
.
<p data-source-line="0">Hello world</p>
.

Heading
.
# Heading 1
.
<h1 data-source-line="0">Heading 1</h1>
.

Multiple headings
.
# H1

## H2

### H3
.
<h1 data-source-line="0">H1</h1>
<h2 data-source-line="2">H2</h2>
<h3 data-source-line="4">H3</h3>
.

Setext heading
.
Heading
=======
.
<h1 data-source-line="0">Heading</h1>
.

Horizontal rule
.
---
.
<hr data-source-line="0">
.

Blockquote
.
> blockquote text
.
<blockquote data-source-line="0">
<p data-source-line="0">blockquote text</p>
</blockquote>
.

Fenced code block
.
```js
var x = 1;
```
.
<pre data-source-line="0"><code class="language-js">var x = 1;
</code></pre>
.

Indented code block
.
    code line 1
    code line 2
.
<pre data-source-line="0"><code>code line 1
code line 2
</code></pre>
.

Tight unordered list
.
- item 1
- item 2
- item 3
.
<ul data-source-line="0">
<li>item 1</li>
<li>item 2</li>
<li>item 3</li>
</ul>
.

Tight ordered list
.
1. first
2. second
3. third
.
<ol data-source-line="0">
<li>first</li>
<li>second</li>
<li>third</li>
</ol>
.

Loose unordered list
.
- item 1

- item 2

- item 3
.
<ul data-source-line="0">
<li>
<p data-source-line="0">item 1</p>
</li>
<li>
<p data-source-line="2">item 2</p>
</li>
<li>
<p data-source-line="4">item 3</p>
</li>
</ul>
.

Loose ordered list
.
1. first

2. second
.
<ol data-source-line="0">
<li>
<p data-source-line="0">first</p>
</li>
<li>
<p data-source-line="2">second</p>
</li>
</ol>
.

Table
.
| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |
.
<table data-source-line="0">
<thead>
<tr>
<th>A</th>
<th>B</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>2</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
.

Mixed blocks
.
# Title

Paragraph here.

- item a
- item b

> quote

---
.
<h1 data-source-line="0">Title</h1>
<p data-source-line="2">Paragraph here.</p>
<ul data-source-line="4">
<li>item a</li>
<li>item b</li>
</ul>
<blockquote data-source-line="7">
<p data-source-line="7">quote</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-source-line="9">
.

Ordered list with start
.
3. three
4. four
.
<ol data-source-line="0" start="3">
<li>three</li>
<li>four</li>
</ol>
.

Nested blockquote
.
> outer
>
> > inner
.
<blockquote data-source-line="0">
<p data-source-line="0">outer</p>
<blockquote data-source-line="2">
<p data-source-line="2">inner</p>
</blockquote>
</blockquote>
.

Nested list
.
- a
  - b
  - c
- d
.
<ul data-source-line="0">
<li>a
<ul data-source-line="1">
<li>b</li>
<li>c</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>d</li>
</ul>
.

Multiple paragraphs
.
First paragraph.

Second paragraph.

Third paragraph.
.
<p data-source-line="0">First paragraph.</p>
<p data-source-line="2">Second paragraph.</p>
<p data-source-line="4">Third paragraph.</p>
.
